overview: A concierge women's health practice specializing in midlife care and sexual wellness, using a whole-body approach that addresses hormonal, nervous system, stress, and metabolic factors.
highlights: Subspecialty approach spanning internal medicine, endocrinology, and gynecology
Provider AASECT-certified and MSCP-credentialed in sexual medicine
targetAudience: Women experiencing midlife changes, sexual health concerns, low libido, hormonal shifts, and complex chronic symptoms.
